name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram in Indianapolis, IN at 7301 W 10th St provides check cashing and money transfers.
description_long:
Located at 7301 W 10th St in Indianapolis, IN, this MoneyGram location operates as a standalone check-cashing store serving the west side of Indianapolis. The branch is open Monday through Thursday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Friday 9 AM to 7:30 PM, and Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM, with no Sunday hours available for Indianapolis customers.

This Indianapolis MoneyGram location offers check cashing, money transfer services, and bill payment options. You can reach them at (317) 209-8385 during business hours to confirm service availability or ask about fees.

When visiting this MoneyGram in Indianapolis, bring a valid government-issued photo ID and any relevant documentation for the service you need. Peak hours tend to be early mornings and lunch breaks, so plan accordingly if you're cashing a large check or sending a significant money transfer.
pros: 63+ documented locations across Indianapolis for high convenience and accessibility
Extended operating hours at partner locations, many open until 7:00-11:30 PM
Dual online and offline capability for managing transfers flexibly
Partnership with major retailers like Walmart and Ace Cash Express ensures familiar, recognizable locations
Location search tool allows customers to find nearby services by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Services available 7 days a week at various locations throughout the city
No requirement for banking relationships—accessible to unbanked and underbanked consumers
cons: Fees and exchange rates are not disclosed on the website, preventing transparent cost comparison
Service quality and speed depend on partner location staffing, not controlled directly by MoneyGram
Limited to money transfer transactions—does not offer account management, savings, or credit-building features
Physical location requirement for most transactions limits convenience compared to fully digital competitors
Partner locations may vary in professionalism and customer service standards
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing accessible money transfer without a bank account
Customers sending money to family or recipients in other locations who need quick access to cash
Individuals preferring in-person transactions over digital platforms for security or comfort
People needing money transfer services outside traditional banking hours
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and individuals needing quick, accessible money transfers through convenient retail locations with extended hours. The main caveat is that it's purely a transaction utility—not a financial account, credit-building tool, or comprehensive banking solution—and fees are not transparently disclosed on their website, requiring direct inquiry at locations.
services: Offline in-person money transfer at partner locations
Cash pickup services at 63+ Indianapolis locations
Services at Ace Cash Express partner locations
Services at independent retailers (mini marts, specialized transfer shops)
meta_description: MoneyGram at 7301 W 10th St, Indianapolis, IN. Check cashing and money transfers on the west side.
